description: You are a sound designer at Cornerstone Community Players, setting up a stereo mix for a radio drama episode called 'The Garden Path'. Read the production brief at /home/ga/Audio/radio_drama/production_brief.txt for full details. In the Ardour session 'MyProject', configure four audio tracks: 'Narrator' (import /home/ga/Audio/radio_drama/narrator_intro.wav, center pan, 0 dB gain, unmuted), 'Alice' (import /home/ga/Audio/radio_drama/character_alice.wav, L100 pan, -3 dB gain, unmuted), 'Bob' (import /home/ga/Audio/radio_drama/character_bob.wav, R100 pan, -3 dB gain, unmuted), and 'Room Tone' (import /home/ga/Audio/radio_drama/ambience_room.wav, center pan, -15 dB gain, muted). Additionally, place location markers for 'Scene 1 - Kitchen', 'Scene 2 - Garden', and 'Scene 3 - Finale'. Export the final stereo mix as a WAV file to /home/ga/Audio/radio_drama_mix/ and save the session. You may delete or repurpose any pre-existing default tracks.
